channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 300,000 — 3cluster units on one property measuring 2200sqm with deed and borehole (Arlington, Harare South)
item.description: USD 300,000 — Arlington, Harare South. 3 beds, 1 bath. 3cluster units on one property measuring 2200sqm with deed and borehole. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
